expectations.evidence: File contains a markdown table with all four dimensions (Feasibility, UX, Business, Delight) in the Rigor Matrix section.
Each dimension row has a numeric score: Feasibility 3/5, UX 3/5, Business 4/5, Delight 2/5, plus a Composite Score of 12/20.
File contains '## Verdict' header followed by a full verdict paragraph.
File contains '## Feasibility Analysis', '## UX Analysis', '## Business Analysis', and '## Delight Analysis' as section headers inside collapsible details blocks.
File contains a dedicated '## Conflicts (Needs Human Judgment)' section with two named conflicts (Drawer vs Redirect, and Launch Now vs Default-to-Draft).
Verdict opens with 'Build campaign duplication, but not as described' and gives a numbered, concrete four-step build sequence with explicit kill decisions.
